# Report Style Guide

Apply these rules to every generated report before delivery.

## Structure

- Lead with a three-bullet executive summary.
- Group changes by component, not by author.
- Link each item to its commit or issue.

## Tone

- Use past tense for shipped work and present tense for in-progress
  work.
- Keep each bullet under two lines.

## Edge Cases

For weeks with releases, follow the additional checklist in
release-weeks.md before sending the report.
